title: Postgres Index Tuning
text: Database indexes can speed up read-heavy workloads. This article explains composite indexes and how to use EXPLAIN plans to verify performance impact. It also covers write amplification tradeoffs and index maintenance cost.

title: Zero Trust Rollout Checklist
text: A security team outlines a phased zero trust rollout. The guide includes identity boundaries, least privilege policies, and continuous verification. It warns about migration pitfalls and emphasizes staged enforcement.

title: Event-Driven Services at Scale
text: This write-up discusses event contracts, retry semantics, and dead-letter queues in asynchronous systems. It compares at-least-once and exactly-once delivery assumptions and recommends idempotent consumers.

title: Static Typing Improvements in Python
text: Recent typing enhancements make Python codebases easier to refactor safely. The article covers type aliases, stricter linting, and migration patterns for legacy modules.

title: Feature Flag Platform Buy vs Build
text: Engineering leaders compare managed feature flag services with internal tooling. They evaluate blast-radius controls, ownership cost, and rollout observability.

title: LLM Inference Cost Management
text: An ML platform team shares techniques to control inference spend. Methods include prompt caching, routing by task complexity, and batching strategies. They present latency and cost benchmarks.

title: API Gateway Decomposition
text: Backend services accumulated too many responsibilities in a single gateway. The team decomposed auth, rate limiting, and routing into separate services. They explain migration steps and operational outcomes.

title: Early Stage Pricing Experiments
text: A startup describes how it iterated on packaging and pricing. The piece focuses on conversion metrics, customer interviews, and product positioning.

title: Distributed SQL Replication Notes
text: This article examines synchronous versus asynchronous replication in distributed SQL systems. It discusses consistency windows, failover behavior, and quorum decisions.

title: Secret Rotation Automation
text: Security engineers automated secret rotation for cloud workloads. The approach integrates policy checks, expiry alerts, and break-glass access controls.

title: Build Cache Optimization
text: Developer productivity improved after optimizing build cache keys and artifact reuse. The post compares local and remote caching and shares practical cache invalidation patterns.

title: Streaming Pipeline Backpressure
text: A data platform team explains backpressure signals and queue health in stream processing. They cover consumer lag monitoring and controlled degradation under traffic spikes.
